kamishibai=3.1
# PR #44 manual smoke-test script.
# 1. Load this file, then press Space or click to start.
# 2. Confirm that the backdrop changes from Title to Stars.
# 3. While the 30-second wait is active, press Right Arrow.
# 4. Confirm that the backdrop changes from Stars to Title.
# This script uses only backdrops embedded in the generic SB3.
asset=Title,backdrop
asset=Stars,backdrop
cover=Title,
---
sceneLabel=first
action=stage:Stars
action=wait:30
---
sceneLabel=second
action=stage:Title
action=wait:30
